items.title: BenQ 4100i Review: Bringing the Cinema to Your Living Room
items.summary: BenQ’s 4100i projector shines with its amazing color reproduction, excellent contrast, and a buttery cinematic mode.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: GTA VI finally gets a price tag
items.summary: We finally have a price for Grand Theft Auto VI: $79.99. That gets you the standard edition of the game, while the Ultimate Edition will set you back $99.99. Preorders start at...

items.title: MoEngage acquires San Francisco-based AI infra startup Aampe
items.summary: The acquisition of Aampe marks a strategic move by MoEngage to expand its AI-powered marketing platform, helping brands deliver highly personalised customer experiences at scale.
